widget_catalog_integration.overview: Guidelines for using the BAW Standard Widget Catalog when designing coaches. This catalog provides access to 89 standard BAW UI widgets that can be combined with custom widgets to create comprehensive, production-ready coaches.

file.name: baw_ui_toolkit_catalog.json
file.description: Complete catalog of all 89 standard BAW UI widgets

file.name: baw_standard_widgets_reference.json
file.description: Curated reference with categorized widgets and usage patterns

contents.item: Widgets organized by category (Input, Layout, Display, Action)
Widget selection guide by use case

guideline.rationale: Built-in, well-tested, no custom widget needed
Standard widget handles all common text area needs

guideline.recommendation: Use standard Date Picker (64.aeae8953-9e72-411e-b35a-93c7ab827c5c) OR custom DateOutput for display-only
guideline.rationale: Standard for input, custom for specialized display formatting

guideline.recommendation: Use standard Single Select OR custom MultiSelect (single mode)
guideline.rationale: Standard for simple dropdowns, custom for enhanced features

guideline.recommendation: Use custom MultiSelect widget for enhanced UX
guideline.rationale: Custom widget provides search, bulk actions, better UX
Custom widget provides animated, color-coded progress display

guideline.recommendation: Use standard Panel, Horizontal Layout, Vertical Layout widgets
guideline.rationale: Standard widgets handle all layout needs
Standard button handles all common actions

actions.action: Identify all data fields and their types
Determine if standard widgets can fulfill requirements
Identify where custom widgets add value

step.title: Consult Widget Catalog
step.description: Reference the catalog for standard widget options

actions.action: Match requirements to standard widget capabilities
Note widget IDs and binding types

step.title: Design Mixed Widget Layout
step.description: Create layout using both standard and custom widgets

design_approach.principle: Use standard widgets as the foundation
Add custom widgets for specialized functionality

step.title: Document Widget Selection
step.description: Explain why each widget was chosen

presentation_format.section: List all fields with their widget types
Explain standard vs custom widget choices

pattern.name: form_with_standard_and_custom
pattern.description: Typical form combining standard inputs with custom widgets

example.rationale: Standard widgets handle basic data entry efficiently. Custom widgets (MultiSelect, ProgressBar) provide enhanced UX for complex selections and status visualization.

note.title: Current Limitation
note.description: The generate_test_coach.py tool currently only supports custom widgets from the widgets/ folder. For coaches that include standard BAW widgets, you should: 1. Design the complete coach structure with both standard and custom widgets 2. Document the design clearly for the user 3. Explain that standard widgets must be added manually in IBM BAW Studio 4. Provide the exact widget names and IDs from the catalog 5. Show the complete layout structure

note.title: Future Enhancement
note.description: The coach generation system could be enhanced to support standard widgets by referencing the widget catalog and generating complete coach XML that includes both standard and custom widgets. This would enable fully automated coach generation for production use.

communication_guidelines.guideline: Always reference the widget catalog when designing coaches with multiple fields
Explain the rationale for choosing standard vs custom widgets
Provide widget IDs from the catalog for reference
Show the complete coach structure including both widget types
Be clear about what can be auto-generated vs what needs manual addition
